textByHash.07260d5ecd555f59fb4c6fa5304e64af62c94362: Oh now come on. You have it with you!
textByHash.09abf64c1ce5c87fcd8eaed93163dc5300d5810b: More studying for you my boy.
textByHash.0b78125af55af0e346b1a32fe01753281f7774b4: You got 1 question correct. At least it's a start.
textByHash.0c9c1148b7b256ada0ac9eef0f4dd5e670ae4293: Okay, this is the next part of the Earth Sciences exam: Earth Sciences level 2 - Intermediate.
textByHash.0e4a2ea10d419b1cd7c14d158cabeff487894ff7: I'm afraid you have not finished the puzzle.
textByHash.1673283359b205c2ba0bb54ad7fd9a1b14bbd1e3: Earth Sciences level 1, question 3 - Health and safety. Can you tell me the proper safety points when working on a digsite?
textByHash.1cd9a6086ec5f799a2b7fe10a764b5b8670d15c2: Let me add up the results..
textByHash.1e56d2eed83c7c396a6b04f4de40538172da2d69: Okay, that concludes the level 3 Earth Sciences exam.
textByHash.25040a1855064bebec61886853d7843c665d3292: Perhaps you should use your newfound skills to find an artefact on the digsite that will impress the archaeological expert.
textByHash.287445f947c3d55138995ba00513421e19b26d00: Question 1 - Earth Sciences overview. Can you tell me what Earth Sciences is?
textByHash.2e50e81e8f3ef7b65026689d76fbafb26b0e199b: Hello again. Are you ready for another shot at the exam?
textByHash.35a9837e1fff09acf398a258b27b371c3fd13727: Well, what are you doing here? Get digging!
textByHash.3b23466087783f9e4c6b55e8a3d7ae3ab4b54b4a: Well, well, have you not been doing any studies? I am not giving you the answers, talk to the other students and remember the answers.
textByHash.3fb5b9aff732a2af0ee0ee1a33a4c02d4086dee4: Because he is a very knowledgeable man and employs our archaeological expert. I'm sure he knows a lot about your exploits and can judge whether you'd make a good archaeologist or not.
textByHash.41bce2ce8f5ca9410eeeccac4065ef9fba7a5cdb: Okay, we will start with the first exam: Earth Sciences level 1 - Beginner.
textByHash.4324d0e8bc523694419800d66a0b234cf13c3ab9: I am still waiting for your letter of recommendation.
textByHash.44c714b38a9887466191c9d17ee535660e89a9b8: I am sure you won't get any problems. Speak to the Curator of Varrock's museum.
textByHash.4d878c3f4517240bb128e966eb001ccbbfbb98db: More studying for you my friend.
textByHash.4e1104acc7e10e08876a5bd4071d79750c06baac: You got all the questions correct, well done!
textByHash.4ec351af3613191ed2417cab0cab632e5fb5493d: That was foolish. Take this one and don't lose it!
textByHash.523438a3bdc54dd552f4cf86f45951cda21c3a4d: Oh deary me! This is appalling, none correct at all! I suggest you go and study properly.
textByHash.53ed91f55e1933ee1d894bddf06e1aecbede677f: You could gain much with an understanding of the world below.
textByHash.5c760ab2deef30f88268a19e0a257c476e5890b2: Earth Sciences level 2, question 3 - Rock pick usage. Can you tell me the proper use for a rock pick?
textByHash.5d6ffd2fbaf05c27309bb34b6bd39d4bd54aec1a: Let me add up your total..
textByHash.612045850df717721eaed0fad668aa5f513e614f: I cannot believe this! Absolutely none right at all. I doubt you did any research before you took this exam...
textByHash.696305ff92dadb502a02a83fc1f55af78425f23f: You got all of the questions correct! Well done!
textByHash.7462a5fe531dd5aea5a89774e6f6add254e37060: No, no, no! This will not do. They are all wrong; start again!
textByHash.75392c10e4e5f07f7fe9a77c0317aa312b23ced7: Are you sure you want to? Our exams are serious business.
textByHash.7d3375767287f640978e10ff45951883d36b7b38: More studying for you my girl.
textByHash.82a7dd30e1efc762cb07431072cdc6671e6680c5: Besides, the museum contributes funds to the dig.
textByHash.8746e11f301da7041b6c256b5484f68d5482afb3: You have now passed the Earth Sciences level 1 general exam. Here is your certificate to prove it. You also get a decent trowel to dig with. Of course, you'll want to get studying for your next exam now!
textByHash.8b8d8fdbf402314378da3f3abe8a4e0a49741fc3: That concludes the exam for Earth Sciences level 1.
textByHash.90e7428f9fcc24629d15882837af45b9c1980041: Earth Sciences level 3, question 3 - Advanced techniques. Can you describe the technique for handling bones?
textByHash.9ab878d4eace46c5500c360cb774ced71e044de8: I don't really want this back until it's been stamped!
textByHash.9e20a581f1efa25f829c7957f35039f8e564ba36: Earth Sciences level 2, question 2 - Handling of finds. What is the proper way to handle finds?
textByHash.9f4109fb83940c8323d54fb2afceb6fff2ee19d3: Very well. You can if you get this letter stamped by the Curator of Varrock's museum.
textByHash.a0cc87ce0d31b6c8470d4201b5f13dc8ac71f77d: Why don't you use the resources here? There are books and the researchers, and you could even ask other students who are also studying for these exams.
textByHash.a10c0bf100ebf6aa71496ac7675f8b97f435ae17: Earth Sciences level 1, question 2 - Eligibility. Can you tell me which people are allowed to use the digsite?
textByHash.a322e46ecd8ea38e830db1cda3dbbcbcff75589b: Attention, this is the final part of the Earth Sciences exam: Earth Sciences level 3 - Advanced.
textByHash.a779a9604fe5a69ba8efd76f5eac34b5e4cd294e: He's also a very busy man, so I write the letters and he justs stamps them if he approves.
textByHash.afbee794e0a63ba8806ad483739a150178b429db: You got 2 questions correct. Not too bad, but you can do better...
textByHash.b0a43618ee4895c0082815f844270a3fc476bfb9: Really? Look in your backpack and make sure first.
textByHash.b57610b020198a61fe78c0957f02d964221b626a: Okay, take your time if you wish.
textByHash.b8c6bd9a35c9d2be2b66d46c3ad0990f40b5b95c: Good good, we will begin the exam...
textByHash.b91958c0d22131f8ca5749df9558fbd5bd9e11c5: That's right! We have to make sure that students know enough to be able to dig safely and not damage the artefacts.
textByHash.bc8837a08a0ce78b0dd5c64e6b711ea13abdc127: Question 1 - Sample transportation. Can you tell me how we transport samples?
textByHash.bdc41f27cd62dd20d32ae120a1639c8eccd37c2d: Ah hello there! I am the resident lecturer on antiquities and artefacts. I also set the Earth Sciences exams.
textByHash.c238e03020a66b64e6f44a2b20e24785b3c6ff21: That is right dear, the world of Gielinor holds many wonders beneath its surface. Students come to me to take exams so that they may join in on the archaeological dig going on just north of here.
textByHash.c390d3fcfba4389fdcc861dade6df519a2c8871b: A great scholar and archaeologist indeed! Good health and prosperity to you.
textByHash.c9daac8ddea209f7b16017f6d37b449a2872fb1e: Deary me... That was a good one as well. It's a good job I have another. Here you go...
textByHash.d5e6e03290ff0194ce52295201c3cbea2176af59: Do some more research. I'm sure other students could help you out.
textByHash.d81e9f730cc3fd189abf483c46e4e65814d0b08a: You got 1 question correct. Better luck next time.
textByHash.e47adc0f35aee7639919a4dfc5942ebb7f7dbfbc: Question 1 - Sample preparation. Can you tell me how we prepare samples?
textByHash.e69c1d425887c4b768b703d0996b765ef804f1f2: Get out and explore the digsite, talk to people and learn!
textByHash.e7e1be04040bf3a5450f1632bf35a8d7e928ccff: You got 2 questions correct. Not bad, just a little more revision needed.
textByHash.ec52df04452413199172ef2764f9d9fb422dbaa1: Earth Sciences level 3, question 2 - Specimen brush use. What is the proper way to use a specimen brush?
textByHash.eea3fe11b48a05891b1d0c6847e832808a714917: You got 1 question correct. Try harder!
textByHash.f331d27d533979333161af6414e8e624aad1d01d: Okay, that concludes the level 2 Earth Sciences exam.
textByHash.f7119efd0b54b5dfe239c08791bdc7dcb2970484: You've already shown me that! Get digging!
textByHash.f81172ced4fdfbb0d8e2fa78c1c61d031ed96034: Congratulations! You have now passed the Earth Sciences level 3 exam. Here is your level 3 certificate.
textByHash.f83c3064efe7f25c10065ca9d982b9d252e1dabb: Hello there! My colleague tells me you helped to uncover a hidden altar to the god Zaros.
textByHash.fb313745697b37db8ab7730e51b5b394cfa6f804: You got 2 questions correct. A little more study and you will pass it.
textByHash.ff4a02611bba3759090fc280d51b621202e87366: You have now passed the Earth Sciences level 2 intermediate exam. Here is your certificate. Of course, you'll want to get studying for your next exam now!
